text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Since I had the day off, I decided to check out
some shops I was curious about.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I found the produce shop especially intriguing
with the way they cut up the amount of
vegetables you order right there on the spot!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
The moment they slice those big vegetables so
cleanly is just... thrilling! It was a truly
breathtaking experience. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It sounds like Satono Diamond made the most of
her day off.
